calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-01-2010 Granted Per Written Order

Joinder Of Stephen N.Yugoff In Petition For Preliminary Distribution And Approval Of Settlement Agreement And Release
Off Calendar Sep-21-2009 Off Calendar

Petition For Preliminary Distribution, And Approval Of Settlement Agreement, And Release
Off Calendar Jul-14-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Shearer for Stephen Yugoff. Mark Shustoff for Michael Shah. Paul Yugoff appearing in propria persona.

Paul Yugoff appears to oppose the pre-grant of the petition. Mr. Yugoff stated that he had been chasing papers, that his Sister's Estate was handed over to a stranger, Michael Shah the Administrator, that he had received notice at an old address, and that he needed time to obtain an Attorney. Mr. Yugoff stated his current address for the record in open court. Mr. Shearer stated that this isn't the family Estate, that it is the Dwinnell Estate, that Mr. Yugoff is presenting the same old things, that Mr. Yugoff knows how to file written objections, that as far as the address goes Mr. Yugoff is sent notice at the address he personally provided to the parties, and that he is opposed to a continuance of this matter. Mr. Shustoff stated that Mr. Yugoff did not object to the Petition to Probate, that he has received nothing in writing from Mr. Yugoff, and that nothing has come back in the mail that was sent to Mr. Yugoff. The Court stated that Mr. Yugoff had stated that he had received the documents. Mr. Yugoff stated that things needed to be slowed down a bit, that he needed time to make his way through all the mail, and that he needed time to get an Attorney. The Court denied Mr. Yugoff's request for additional time to hire an Attorney, stated that Mr. Yugoff had notice, that it had listened to all of his objections, and that it was overruling them. The petition remains granted as ordered.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR#7489. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Sep-10-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Edward Koplowitz for Elena Dwinnell. Mark Shustoff for Michael Shah (Petitioner). Paul Yugoff in Propria Persona.

After hearing oral argument, the Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court). The Court denied Mr. Yugoff's objection.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: J. Alameda/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy W. Yee.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Aug-20-2008 Continued To Sep-10-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Yugoff in Pro Per. Mark Shustoff for the Petitioner.

This was a pre-granted matter. The matter was continued to September 10, 2008 at the request of Mr. Yugoff.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bonner.
